title: Mirroring multiple columns in a board to a single column in another board
excerpt: Is there a way to mirror multiple columns in one board to a single mirror column in another board?

posts.author: Moorebankamcal (Pranita)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to mirror multiple columns in one board to a single mirror column in another board?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: No. What’s your use case, maybe we can come up with a different way?

posts.author: Moorebankamcal (Pranita)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m using a board to track the onboarding of a customer for sleep tests. We have a number of consultations during the onboarding and i have a status column to track if the customer has been contacted etc. I wanted to use a board that amalgamates all the status’s in one column from that board

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Got it! Is each board already connected with a connected column?

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com

posts.author: Moorebankamcal (Pranita)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes they are connected with a connected column

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Moorebankamcal ,

You could try our app - Mirror Item Multiple Boards .

We could create a separate board and add all the you’d like to see to it. Anytime status changes on the original item, it will reflect on your board.

It’s very simple to setup. Happy to walk you through it here
